title: Resolved Status Customization v1
description: Host-neutral status and customization bundle. Defines segments, theme, and per-host overrides. Stipe injects this into Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor; cap previews it; lamella packages presets against it; annulus renders from it.

segments.description: Ordered list of status segments. Consumers render segments in array order.

host_overrides.description: Optional per-host field overrides. Keys are canonical host names. Values may override any top-level fields for that host.

segment.description: A single status segment. The id must match a known annulus segment name.

id.description: Segment identifier. Matches annulus segment names.

config.description: Segment-specific optional configuration (e.g. display format, threshold values). Contents are segment-dependent.

theme.description: Color and formatting preferences for the statusline.

host_override.description: Per-host field overrides. Only the fields that differ from the top-level bundle need to be present.

metadata.description: Optional metadata about the bundle origin and identity.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this bundle was created.

preset_name.description: Optional lamella preset name this bundle was built from.
